actions.name: create_post
actions.doc: Creates a new blog post on elchemista.com with a given title and content body
actions.spec: create_post(title :: String.t(), body :: String.t()) :: {:ok, Post.t()} | {:error, term()}
examples: WRITE NEW BLOG POST FOR elchemista.com WITH: TITLE={title} TEXT={text}

actions.name: create_payment_link
actions.doc: Generates a new checkout session on Stripe for a given product name, amount, and currency
actions.spec: create_payment_link(amount :: integer(), currency :: String.t(), name :: String.t())
examples: CREATE STRIPE PAYMENT LINK WITH: AMOUNT={amount} CURRENCY={currency} PRODUCT_NAME={name}
